color_field_palette.value: Two brand-owned color fields only: (1) ALBAIK signature deep brick-crimson red (≈ a rich tomato-to-maroon red, NOT a generic KFC bright red — it reads slightly cooler and deeper), almost always rendered as a center-bright radial glow falling to dark maroon at the edges; (2) ALBAIK golden-yellow (the price-disc / wordmark / packaging-pattern yellow). A deep navy-blue field is the owned occasion variant (night/Eid/Ramadan/fish). White is the owned neutral (the packaging bag). A color-blocking chain may fill the frame ONLY from {crimson-red, golden-yellow, navy-blue, white} — never a borrowed reference red/orange.
color_field_palette.evidence: Crimson radial-glow field is the recurring background in DK7AbSvPiRI (Twin Combo), DYxbBpFjaF2 + DTsJWGkjHuK (The Twin / shawerma), DSXzMZukaUS. Golden-yellow is the price discs, the 'The Twin' wordmark, and the yellow wrap-pattern in DUYuWzmjQVQ + DRzpf6YAcIR. Navy field in DUYuWzmjQVQ, DRAZ_tpgt2f (fish combo), DVRXKGplejk (Ramadan coupons). White packaging bag with red logo in DK7AbSvPiRI. Logo itself (red top-hat + gold beak chick) carries red+yellow. Same palette repeats across 10+ sampled posts = brand-owned, not per-post.

palette_primary.value: ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries.
palette_primary.evidence: Red+yellow is the only pair present in the brand logo (red top-hat chick, gold beak) and recurs as field+accent in DK7AbSvPiRI, DYxbBpFjaF2, DTsJWGkjHuK, DSXzMZukaUS. Yellow price disc on red field is the repeated layout signature (The Twin series).

background_tone.value: Warm, deep, and saturated — a center-lit radial glow (bright core behind the hero food, falling to dark maroon/charred edges), giving a dramatic studio-ember mood rather than a flat pastel. The spicy/'حراق' line darkens to near-black with orange ember sparks; occasion posts swap to a deep starry navy. Tone is consistently rich and high-contrast, never light/airy except the deliberate clean-white promo cuts.
background_tone.evidence: Radial crimson glow in DK7AbSvPiRI / DYxbBpFjaF2 / DTsJWGkjHuK; near-black background with floating orange ember sparks in DXzkeYyjdUb (دبل كرسبي بيك حراق); dark esports plinth scene with golden rim-light in DMaODC4vbHc; clean light-grey/white cut in DSXzMZukaUS shows the exception.

capture_character.value: Glossy high-gloss commercial fast-food photography: single hard key light producing crisp specular highlights on melted cheese, glistening sauce drips and sesame-bun sheen, deep contact shadows, and a saturated color-field backdrop with radial vignette. Surfaces look freshly fried and juicy (visible oil sheen, steam-implied moisture). Hero food shot close and slightly above eye level on a clean or reflective surface; ember-spark particles added on the spicy line; tightly retouched, appetite-maximized, not documentary/natural.
capture_character.evidence: Specular cheese-melt and sauce gloss in DK7AbSvPiRI, DXzkeYyjdUb, DSXzMZukaUS; ember-spark realism layer in DXzkeYyjdUb; reflective hero plinth + golden rim-light in DMaODC4vbHc (esports combo); crisp golden breading texture consistently sharp-focus across all burger/sandwich shots.

products.name: كرسبي بيك / دبل كرسبي بيك (Crispy Baik Fillet burger — single & double)

material_texture.value: Three stacked substrates with distinct light behavior: (1) the breaded chicken fillet — a craggy, deep-golden-amber crust with raised crispy nubs that catch hard light as a field of tiny specular hotspots and cast micro-shadows (reads dry/crunchy, NOT smooth); (2) the sesame-topped bun — a matte-to-soft-sheen domed top, lightly glossed, sesame seeds as small raised speckles; (3) the molten cheese + creamy/garlic-orange sauce — wet, glossy, light-pooling drips with bright specular streaks. Pickle slices add translucent wet-green gloss.
material_texture.evidence: DXzkeYyjdUb (دبل كرسبي بيك): two stacked craggy golden fillets, a sheet of melted cheese drooping, orange spiced sauce drip, sesame bun. Single in DSXzMZukaUS and DYxbBpFjaF2 (Eid Twin). Crust nub texture and sauce gloss visible at full sharpness.

dimensions.value: Single: a sesame bun ≈ 9–10 cm diameter; the assembled burger ≈ 7–8 cm tall. Scale-anchor = the standing ALBAIK soda can beside it (a 250–330 ml can ≈ 11–13 cm tall), so a single burger is ~0.6× can height; the DOUBLE (دبل, two stacked fillets + cheese) rises to ~0.85–1× the can's height.
dimensions.evidence: DK7AbSvPiRI and DRAZ_tpgt2f place the burger directly beside the ALBAIK can — the single burger sits well below the can lip; in DXzkeYyjdUb the double burger's two-fillet stack nearly matches a can's height. Bun-vs-can ratio read directly from those frames.

companion_elements.value: One hero companion only: the ALBAIK fries in the white-with-red-logo paper bag (the brand's iconic packaging). Restrained supporting world (use sparingly, never all at once): the navy ALBAIK soda can, the white dipping cup of garlic sauce (ثومية), scattered ember sparks for the حراق/spicy variant.
companion_elements.evidence: Fries-in-white-ALBAIK-bag is the repeated companion in DK7AbSvPiRI and DRAZ_tpgt2f; ALBAIK navy can in the same frames; white sauce dip cup + extra fries in the DMaODC4vbHc combo; ember sparks accompany the spicy double in DXzkeYyjdUb.

products.name: التوأم — برجر فيليه الدجاج (The Twin — Chicken Fillet Burger, sold as a pair)

material_texture.value: Same substrate truth as the crispy fillet but a single fillet per bun: one craggy golden-amber breaded fillet (matte-crisp crust, hard-light speckle highlights), creamy white + garlic-orange sauce pooling glossy at the bun seam, two glossy translucent pickle discs, sesame-domed bun with soft sheen. Cheese slice (when 'with cheese') reads as a smooth glossy molten drape.
material_texture.evidence: DK7AbSvPiRI, DSXzMZukaUS, DYxbBpFjaF2 all show the paired single-fillet burgers — visible crisp crust, sauce gloss, sesame bun, pickle sheen. Caption corpus 'برجر فيليه الدجاج مع جبنة' confirms the cheese variant.

dimensions.value: Each burger ≈ 9–10 cm bun diameter, ≈ 6–7 cm tall (a single thin fillet, shorter than the crispy stack). Scale-anchor = it is always shown as a matched PAIR (two identical burgers), and beside the fries bag/can in combos; one burger ≈ 0.55× the ALBAIK can height.
dimensions.evidence: Always rendered as two side-by-side identical units in DYxbBpFjaF2, DSXzMZukaUS, DK7AbSvPiRI; combo frame DK7AbSvPiRI shows the pair next to the can and fries bag for direct size read.

companion_elements.value: One hero companion: the second identical twin burger itself (the pairing IS the product's world — 'التوأم/The Twin'). Restrained extras for the combo cut only: the white ALBAIK fries bag and the navy soda can.
companion_elements.evidence: The twin-pairing is the literal product concept across DYxbBpFjaF2, DSXzMZukaUS, DK7AbSvPiRI ('كومبو التوأم' / 'The Twin Combo'); fries bag + can appear only in the combo layout DK7AbSvPiRI.

products.name: ساندوتش فيليه الدجاج / شاورما البيك (Chicken Fillet wrap & ALBAIK Shawerma)

material_texture.value: Soft flexible flatbread/saj wrap — a pale, pliable matte bread that folds and creases (soft fabric-like light response, gentle shadow in the folds, NOT rigid), wrapped in the yellow-and-red ALBAIK printed paper sleeve. Filling end exposed: craggy golden crispy chicken pieces, glossy white garlic sauce, glossy pickle discs, and pale golden fries batons peeking out.
material_texture.evidence: DUYuWzmjQVQ + DRzpf6YAcIR show the yellow logo-pattern paper wrap with the soft bread and exposed crispy-chicken/fries/pickle/sauce filling; DTsJWGkjHuK (شاورما البيك) shows the plain soft saj wrap with the same filling. Soft creasing of bread clearly visible.

dimensions.value: ≈ 16–18 cm long, ≈ 5–6 cm diameter — a hand-held tube. Scale-anchor = a single grasping hand / the paper sleeve covering roughly the lower two-thirds; length ≈ 1.5× the ALBAIK soda can height when laid horizontal.
dimensions.evidence: Hand-roll proportions read from DUYuWzmjQVQ, DRzpf6YAcIR, DTsJWGkjHuK where the wrap is shown horizontally with the paper sleeve; consistent tube geometry across all three.

companion_elements.value: One hero companion: the printed ALBAIK paper sleeve/wrap (yellow ground, repeating red top-hat-chick logo) that the roll sits in — its real-world carrier. Restrained extra: the second matched wrap (the 'التوأم' twin pairing).
companion_elements.evidence: Yellow logo-pattern sleeve is the integral companion in DUYuWzmjQVQ and DRzpf6YAcIR; twin-pairing layout in DTsJWGkjHuK ('التوأم 2X شاورما البيك').

products.name: كومبو سمك / برجر سمك (Fish / Filet-o-Fish burger combo — مقرمش وطري)

material_texture.value: Battered fish fillet — a lighter, more uniform pale-golden crispy coating (finer, less craggy than chicken; 'مقرمش' crunchy outside, 'طري' soft inside), glossy white tartar/garlic sauce, sesame bun. Paired with the brand's ridged potato CHIPS (not batons) — thin, curved, oil-sheened crisps spilling from a yellow music-note-pattern paper cup.
material_texture.evidence: DRAZ_tpgt2f ('كومبو برجر سمك / مقرمش وطري'): two fish burgers, a yellow patterned chips cup with curved potato crisps, navy ALBAIK can, on a deep-blue brand field. Fish-batter texture distinctly finer/paler than the chicken crust.

dimensions.value: Fish burger ≈ 9–10 cm bun, ≈ 6 cm tall. Scale-anchor = the navy ALBAIK can standing beside it (≈ 11–13 cm) — burger ≈ 0.5× can height; the chips cup ≈ same height as the can.
dimensions.evidence: DRAZ_tpgt2f composes burger + can + chips cup together at matched scale — direct ratio read from the frame.

companion_elements.value: One hero companion: the ALBAIK chips cup (yellow, music-note/logo pattern) of curved potato crisps. Restrained extras: the navy ALBAIK soda can; the deep-blue brand field as the 'sea/fresh' cue.
companion_elements.evidence: Chips cup + can are the combo's world in DRAZ_tpgt2f; deep-blue field consistently used for the fish/sea product (vs crimson for chicken).

material_texture.value: Deep-fried falafel — a dark-golden-to-brown craggy crisp shell with a coarse cracked surface (catches hard light as scattered hotspots), revealing a soft green-flecked herby interior when broken; served with glossy white tahini/garlic sauce and soft flatbread. Drier, denser, more matte crust than the chicken breading.
material_texture.evidence: Falafel is a confirmed corpus product (truth_pack product_candidates 'فلافل'; hashtags #ALBAIKFalafel #فلافل_البيك #FalafelALBAIK; brand_language). Material truth = standard ALBAIK fry-crust behavior observed on the chicken/fish across the sampled hero shots, applied to the falafel ball form.

dimensions.value: Each falafel ball ≈ 3.5–4.5 cm diameter. Scale-anchor = served as a cluster on/with soft flatbread and a dipping cup; a single ball ≈ one-third the diameter of the ALBAIK bun (≈ 9–10 cm), i.e. roughly the size of a large date or a folded fingertip.
dimensions.evidence: Ball-to-bun ratio inferred from ALBAIK bun dimensions read directly in DK7AbSvPiRI/DSXzMZukaUS; falafel-with-bread serving is the brand's standard format (#FalafelALBAIK).

companion_elements.value: One hero companion: the white dipping cup of ALBAIK garlic/tahini sauce. Restrained extras: soft flatbread underneath, a sprig of parsley/pickle. Keep ONE hero only.
companion_elements.evidence: White garlic-sauce dip cup is the recurring ALBAIK companion seen in DMaODC4vbHc (combo) and DVRXKGplejk (coupon meal '1 صلصة مسحب'); sauce is core to the ALBAIK serving ritual per corpus brand_language.

products.name: بيكيز / ستربس (Baikies / chicken strips) & سوبر بيك جمبري (Super Baik Shrimp)

material_texture.value: Baikies/strips — small craggy deep-golden breaded chicken fingers, very crisp dry crust with pronounced light-catching ridges, served loose. Shrimp (جمبري) — battered prawn pieces with the same fine pale-golden crunchy coating as the fish line, glossy where the breading thins. Both pair with glossy white garlic-sauce dip.
material_texture.evidence: Strips (the breaded-finger form) are visible on the esports combo plate in DMaODC4vbHc beside the soft-serve and fries; products confirmed in corpus (truth_pack 'بيكيز' / 'بيكيز / ستربس' and 'جمبري / سوبر بيك جمبري'; hashtags #بيكيز #بيكيز_البيك #سوبر_بيك_جمبري). Crust behavior taken from the observed ALBAIK fry-crust across hero shots.

dimensions.value: Each strip ≈ 9–11 cm long, ≈ 2.5 cm wide; each breaded shrimp ≈ 4–5 cm. Scale-anchor = served as a small pile in a paper boat / on the combo plate; a strip ≈ 0.8× the ALBAIK can height laid horizontal; 3–4 strips fill one paper boat.
dimensions.evidence: Strip size read from DMaODC4vbHc where two strips sit on the combo plinth next to the can and fries for direct scale; finger-food proportions consistent with that frame.

companion_elements.value: One hero companion: the white ALBAIK garlic-sauce dip cup (the dip is the strips/shrimp ritual). Restrained extras: the fries bag, a lemon wedge for the shrimp. ONE hero companion only.
companion_elements.evidence: Strips shown with the white sauce dip + fries on the combo plate in DMaODC4vbHc; the garlic-sauce dip is the brand's signature pairing across the meal corpus (DVRXKGplejk coupon lists the sauce; brand serving ritual).

confidence: experimental — grounded in 10 real ALBAIK creatives sampled from clients/albaik/media/ + corpus truth_pack products/hashtags/brand_language. Palette, capture character, and the first 4 products (crispy fillet, twin burger, fillet/shawerma wrap, fish combo) are directly visually evidenced. Falafel, Baikies/strips, and shrimp are corpus-confirmed SKUs (hashtags + product_candidates) with material/dimension/companion values extrapolated from the brand's observed fry-crust behavior and serving ritual — these three carry slightly lower visual grounding and await a client confirm. No price values asserted (truth_pack prices empty; on-image prices are LTO and per-branch). fingerprint l3_visual was empty, so all visual DNA here is freshly grounded from media, not inherited.

color_field_palette.value: Three brand-owned fields ONLY, all evidenced from the real packaging/identity: (1) deep crimson oxblood red (the signature gift-box red) ~#9E1B1B–#7E1414; (2) warm gold / mustard-yellow (the eight-point-star lid label + gold serving pot + 'أطلب الان' CTA) ~#C9971F–#E0B23A; (3) cream / ivory off-white (the kraft cup body + star-label field + lower CTA band) ~#F3EAD7. A color-blocking chain fills the frame with crimson, gold, or cream — and pops via their mutual contrast (crimson↔cream, gold↔crimson). EXCLUDE: blue, the carpet's indigo, terracotta-as-field (terracotta is a companion/apron color, not a fill field), and any borrowed reference red/orange.
color_field_palette.evidence: Crimson is the gift-box color in DV63TOKDCmy, DV6mMArDDq4, DV6od-KjAk4, DXW5KvBDFpe and the round wordmark badge in DWpHuyijLHB. Gold/mustard is the star lid-label on EVERY cup, the serving pot+spoon in DV63TOKDCmy, and the 'أطلب الان' button in DV6od-KjAk4. Cream is the cup body and star-label field across all product shots and the CTA band in DV6od/DWFL8. These three recur as the brand's own identity colors, not props.

palette_primary.value: Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy.
palette_primary.evidence: Across all 8 images the red gift box is the single most repeated brand-owned object (5 of 8 shots), and the red/gold/cream triad is the only color set the brand applies to its OWN surfaces (box, lid label, badge, CTA). The food itself is warm beige (porridge) — a product color, not the brand field.

background_tone.value: Warm, dark-leaning heritage ground — deep saturated heritage textile (red tribal/Persian carpet or Najdi sadu weave) under warm low-key directional light, OR a clean warm cream studio sweep for CTA/packaging beauty shots. Never cool, never pure-white clinical, never daylight-flat. Shadows are warm and present (chiaroscuro), not lifted.
background_tone.evidence: Textile grounds: red Persian carpet in DV6mMArDDq4/DV6od/DXW5KvBDFpe, palm-frond + sadu mat in DV63TOKDCmy/DWFL8, dark warm tungsten in DWmCb6. Cream sweep ground behind the apron in DXFEJbnjCms and the lower CTA bands in DV6od/DWFL8. Consistent warm color temperature throughout.

capture_character.value: Warm, intimate, appetite-first food photography with a documentary-Najdi-home feel: a single warm directional key (golden/tungsten), shallow depth-of-field isolating the dish, visible steam, glistening samn/oil pooling on the porridge surface, real plated heat — staged on authentic heritage surfaces (sadu weave, tribal carpet, palm-frond mat, clay finjan). Soft-edged shadows, not hard studio editorial; the 'just-served at the family table' character, never sterile pack-shot.
capture_character.evidence: DWmCb6-jAly: extreme macro with visible steam, oil glisten, shallow DOF, clay finjans bokeh'd behind, warm tungsten chiaroscuro. DV63TOKDCmy & DWFL8: warm side light, real garnish (roasted peppers/chili), heritage mats. DXFEJbnjCms: soft window-style key on a held kabsa tray, terracotta apron, real hands in gloves — lived-in not studio.

products.name: جريش / جريشة (signature cracked-wheat porridge, single cup)

material_texture.value: Two real substrates in one hero: (a) the FOOD — a thick, creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge with a coarse semi-rough surface, matte except where melted samn/oil pools into glossy golden rivulets that catch the key light; soft, spoonable, holds a peak; topped with glossy roasted-red-pepper + chili-tomato relish (wet, light-reflective). (b) the VESSEL — a white rigid paper/kraft cup (smooth matte sidewall, slight ribbing at the rim) sealed by a cream-and-gold eight-point-star paperboard lid (matte coated stock, flat — not glossy plastic). Substrate behavior: porridge reads soft and gravity-settled; oil reads as specular highlights; the cup reads as rigid matte board, never plastic-shiny.
material_texture.evidence: DWmCb6-jAly shows the coarse matte porridge with glossy oil rivulets and steam; DV63TOKDCmy shows the white kraft cup with chili-tomato topping; the cream/gold star lid recurs on every closed cup (DV6mMArDDq4, DV6od, DXW5KvBDFpe).

dimensions.value: ≈9–11cm tall single-serve paper cup, ≈10–11cm rim diameter. Scale anchor: the cream-and-gold star lid that sits on it is the same ~10–11cm diameter — so frame the cup as ~1× the lid's width and ~1× a closed adult fist in height. Against the crimson gift box (≈30cm long) the cup is roughly 1/3 the box length.
dimensions.evidence: DV63TOKDCmy and DXW5KvBDFpe show the cup beside its own star lid (matching diameters) and beside the long crimson box; DV6od shows lid, box and cup together for direct proportion.

companion_elements.value: World = the Najdi family table. ONE hero companion: a small glossy roasted-red chili pepper resting on/beside the porridge surface (its real garnish). Restrained background-only context (never co-hero): the cream-gold star lid, the heritage sadu/carpet ground, a wisp of steam.
companion_elements.evidence: Roasted/fresh red chili sits on the porridge in DV63TOKDCmy, DV6mMArDDq4, DV6od, DWmCb6, DWFL8 — the dish's consistent real garnish and natural single hero companion.

products.name: جريشة — Family size (الحجم العائلي, foil tray)

material_texture.value: Silver crimped-edge aluminium foil baking tray — bright specular metal with fine vertical ridging on the rim that catches hard glints; dull-satin base. Filled with the same coarse matte porridge, here baked so the surface sets to a lightly browned, oil-glazed top crowned with a thick wet chili-tomato-pepper relish (glossy, light-catching). Foil reads as thin pliable rigid metal (creased, reflective), porridge as soft-set with a glazed skin.
material_texture.evidence: DWFL8-wjPCJ and DWmCb6-jAly show the ridged silver foil tray with bright rim glints and the baked, oil-glazed porridge crowned with roasted red peppers and chili-tomato relish.

dimensions.value: ≈22–26cm diameter round foil family tray, ≈5–6cm deep. Scale anchor: the gold dessert spoon laid beside it (~18–19cm long) spans roughly 3/4 of the tray's diameter; the tray fills a serving board/tray it sits on. Reads as ~2–2.5× a single cup's footprint.
dimensions.evidence: DWFL8-wjPCJ shows the foil tray on a pale-green serving board with a full-length gold spoon alongside for direct size reference; small green side-bowls of chili flakes give secondary scale.

companion_elements.value: World = the Eid / Friday family gathering. ONE hero companion: a glossy roasted whole red pepper laid across the porridge center (its signature crown). Restrained context only: small green ceramic side-bowls of chili flakes + lime wedges, gold serving spoon, sadu/carpet ground.
companion_elements.evidence: DWFL8-wjPCJ: whole roasted red pepper crowning the tray as the focal garnish, with green bowls of chili flakes + lime and a gold spoon as restrained supporting props; caption 'جمعة العيد ما تكمل بدونها'.

products.name: رز كابلي (Kabuli rice with meat, sharing platter)

material_texture.value: Loose, separated long-grain rice tinted warm amber-gold from stock and spice, matte with individual glistening oiled grains; topped with dark caramelized braised meat chunks (deep brown, crusted, light-catching fat), bright orange julienned carrot and dark raisins. Served on a polished stainless-steel round platter — high-specular mirror metal with a warm gold-cast reflection of the surroundings. Rice reads granular and soft, meat reads crusted and juicy, platter reads mirror-bright.
material_texture.evidence: DXFEJbnjCms shows the steel platter of amber kabuli rice with caramelized meat, orange carrot slivers and raisins, the steel rim throwing warm reflections.

dimensions.value: ≈40–45cm diameter sharing platter (a two-handed serving tray). Scale anchor: held in two adult gloved hands whose span (~18–20cm each) brackets the rim — platter is ~2× a hand-span wide; it covers the carrier's torso. Reads as a multi-person family platter, far larger than the single cup or family foil tray.
dimensions.evidence: DXFEJbnjCms: the platter is carried in two gloved hands against the torso, hands bracketing the rim, establishing it as a large communal tray.

companion_elements.value: World = the served-to-table hospitality moment. ONE hero companion: the terracotta-orange branded 'جريشة' apron + dark serving gloves of the person presenting the platter (the human-hands hospitality cue). Restrained context: the heritage textile table edge below.
companion_elements.evidence: DXFEJbnjCms: the burnt-orange apron with the white جريشة wordmark and black gloves are the single dominant companion, framing the platter as freshly served.

products.name: Closed retail cup (sealed star-lid single serve, marketplace/Jahez shot)

material_texture.value: Sealed white rigid paper cup + cream paperboard lid printed with the gold/red eight-point-star wordmark medallion. Lid stock is matte-coated (flat, no plastic gloss); the gold star outline and red corner-floret read as printed flat ink, slightly satin. The crimson gift box beneath is a smooth coated rigid carton with a soft satin sheen and a darker star-pattern emboss. Everything reads as clean printed packaging — matte board, not film, not glossy plastic.
material_texture.evidence: DV6od-KjAk4 and DXW5KvBDFpe: the cream star lid sits on the crimson coated box; the lid is matte with flat printed gold star + red floret; box shows satin sheen and tonal star emboss.

dimensions.value: Same ≈10–11cm-diameter single cup, lid ~10–11cm. Scale anchor: it rests on the ≈30cm crimson presentation box — cup footprint is ~1/3 the box length; the small round dip-sauce pots beside it (~5cm) are about half the lid's diameter.
dimensions.evidence: DV6od-KjAk4: cup + box + two ~5cm clear dip pots in one frame give a direct three-object proportion ladder.

companion_elements.value: World = ready-to-order delivery (Jahez). ONE hero companion: the crimson presentation gift box the cup sits on (the brand's signature carrier). Restrained context: two small clear dip-sauce pots (relish + samn), and — only in the marketplace ad — the flat Jahez logo + 'أطلب الان' button on a cream band.
companion_elements.evidence: DV6od-KjAk4: cup on crimson box with two dip pots, Jahez logo + gold 'أطلب الان' CTA on the lower cream band; DXW5KvBDFpe pairs cup + open box + dip pots.

products.name: Spice / aromatics companion set (cardamom, dates, dried lime — table context)

material_texture.value: Loose whole spices and dried fruit with natural matte-to-semi-gloss surfaces: pale-green cardamom pods (papery matte husk), dark glossy soft dates (wet sheen, wrinkled skin), woody cinnamon/dried botanicals, served in a hand-coiled palm-frond (khoos) basket whose dried fronds read as fibrous matte straw. Substrates: pods papery, dates supple-glossy, basket dry-fibrous.
material_texture.evidence: DV63TOKDCmy: top-left palm-frond coil dish holding dark dates and scattered green cardamom pods + dried botanicals on the woven mat.

dimensions.value: ≈12–14cm shallow coiled palm-frond dish; individual dates ~3–4cm, cardamom pods ~1cm. Scale anchor: the dish is roughly the diameter of the single cup's lid; dates are ~1/3 the dish's depth. A supporting-scale element, never larger than the hero cup.
dimensions.evidence: DV63TOKDCmy: the coiled dish sits beside the gift box and cup, visibly smaller than the cup's footprint, with date/pod sizes readable against it.

companion_elements.value: World = the Najdi hospitality table (qahwa/aromatics ring). ONE hero companion when featured: the coiled palm-frond (khoos) basket of dates + cardamom. Restrained context: the sadu-weave mat ground and a hint of the gold pot — never competing with the dish.
companion_elements.evidence: DV63TOKDCmy: the palm-frond dish of dates/cardamom is the clear single heritage companion in the upper frame, on the woven sadu mat beside the gold pot.

products.name: جريشة heritage wordmark / brand badge (identity asset for text-forward & throwback chains)

material_texture.value: The custom rounded Najdi-style 'جريشة' Arabic wordmark rendered in three real treatments: cream/gold-on-crimson (round badge), red-on-cream, and white-on-terracotta (apron). On the round badge it is a flat printed/relief medallion (matte coated, slight ink relief); on the aged-newspaper throwback it reads as halftone-printed vintage ink on cream pulp paper (fibrous, foxed, creased). The mark itself is always flat 2D type, never extruded or glossy 3D.
material_texture.evidence: DWpHuyijLHB: red round 'جريشة' badge top-right + the mark reprised on aged, creased halftone newsprint (vintage 'تركيب تلفون' clipping); DXFEJbnjCms: white wordmark on terracotta apron; DV6od: red mark on cream.

dimensions.value: Logo asset — size is layout-relative, not physical. Scale anchor on real objects: the round red badge prints at ~3–4cm on packaging and ~10cm on the star lid; on the apron the wordmark spans ~18–20cm across the chest. Treat as a flat mark scaled to its surface, anchored to the object it sits on.
dimensions.evidence: DWpHuyijLHB badge vs DXFEJbnjCms chest-width wordmark vs DV6od lid-scale mark show the same mark deployed at object-relative sizes.

companion_elements.value: World = brand heritage / 'Najdi tradition, now one tap away' storytelling. ONE hero companion for the throwback chain: a single aged sepia newspaper clipping (creased pulp paper, halftone portrait of an elder Najdi gentleman) carrying the founding-story device. Restrained context: cream paper ground + the Jahez delivery cue. Never pile multiple props.
companion_elements.evidence: DWpHuyijLHB: one aged newspaper clipping with halftone portrait is the sole hero companion to the wordmark, with a small Jahez scooter motif and 'متوفر الآن على جاهز' as restrained context.

confidence: experimental — values are grounded in 8 real brand media files (clients/eatjurisha/media/) plus truth_pack.json product candidates and fingerprint.json (brand-voice ruling). All colors are brand-OWNED and evidenced from the brand's own packaging/identity surfaces, never borrowed from reference images. However: (1) product list itself is still 'candidate' (truth_pack confirmed:[] — سليق/تمن/باشميل/قرصان/لازانيا are Maps-only, unconfirmed by client and have NO photographed media yet, so I scoped the 6 products to ones with actual visual evidence: cup-جريش, family-foil-جريشة, رز كابلي, closed-retail-cup, aromatics-set, wordmark-asset); (2) l3_visual in fingerprint.json is EMPTY {} so these are first-pass DNA proposals, not a client-confirmed visual law; (3) hex codes are eyeballed-from-image approximations, not extracted brand-guide values; (4) exact dimensions are visual estimates from scale-anchor reasoning, awaiting client confirm per the 'guessed = a lie with confidence' rule. Recommend client/Mohamed gate before promoting any value to confirmed.

color_field_palette.value: Deep wine-maroon / oxblood burgundy (≈#5C1A26–#6B1F2E) as the dominant brand-owned field colour, with a warm brown Sadu/Najdi geometric tone (≈#8A6A3A) used only inside the woven border motif, and creamy ivory/parchment (≈#EDE2C8) as the partner light field. Gold (≈#C9A24B) appears as a typographic/accent colour, never as a flat field. STRICTLY brand-owned — no off-brand red/orange/blue color-blocking allowed.
color_field_palette.evidence: The deep maroon field recurs as the literal background across the brand's own graphic posts: DO8M6Z2jIZA (diamond-ring card on maroon with brown Sadu border), DO8NshsjBLL (90-year anniversary card, solid maroon field + brown geometric border), DPZazMpDAYL (gold-bar investment card on maroon Sadu-patterned ground). Cream/ivory is the partner field (display-bust posts DOeRr0jjKLc, DOeSKrEjG1B; silk-drape edge in DYEnXyZlGjO). Recurring caption term الدمام/مجوهرات confirms a single brand identity, not stock comps.

palette_primary.value: Warm 21K/22K yellow gold — saturated, slightly orange-warm Gulf-gold tone (≈#D4A93A–#E0B43C), high specular sheen — is the hero metal. A secondary cool line exists: white-gold/diamond+CZ baguette (bright silver-white, ≈#E8EAEC) and natural pearl (warm off-white, ≈#F1E9DE). Maroon + cream are the brand's identity colours framing the metal.
palette_primary.evidence: Yellow 21K/22K gold dominates the product corpus: bead-and-wheat bangle+ring set DYTLFKEINgJ, geometric necklace DOeSKrEjG1B, coin-charm necklace DOeRr0jjKLc, filigree majlis necklace DRSVRtDjCSA, filigree set DYEnXyZlGjO, gold bar 999.9 DPZazMpDAYL. White-gold/diamond line: leaf-cluster ring DO8M6Z2jIZA (stamped 750/18K), pearl+diamond pendants DXSDa2ZDEAg & DXSFYIWDBHI. Hashtags confirm both lines: ذهب_عيار٢١ / ذهب_عيار١٨ and ألماس / لؤلؤ_طبيعي.

background_tone.value: Two grounded modes: (1) STUDIO — seamless deep-maroon-to-cream gradient sweep, warm and unlit-edged, the gold/metal lifted off a creamy ivory display bust or surface against an oxblood backdrop. (2) EDITORIAL/ENVIRONMENTAL — burgundy silk drape, dark leather antique-book surfaces, or warm-tungsten Najdi-majlis interiors. Never cold white; never neutral grey. Tone is always warm, dim, gallery-luxe.
background_tone.evidence: Studio gradient: DOeSKrEjG1B & DOeRr0jjKLc (gold on cream bust against maroon ground). Silk drape: DYEnXyZlGjO (burgundy satin). Leather-book surface: DYcSAkSlFb8, DYepoLCFhWG, DYTLFKEINgJ (deep-brown leather, dim warm light). Majlis interior: DVEvMAUjKQP (warm tungsten, lanterns, mud-brick). Maroon curtain ground: DRwgVHCjCiW. No cold/white-box background appears anywhere in the sampled corpus.

capture_character.value: Polished editorial luxury jewellery photography: warm directional key light with controlled soft falloff, high specular highlights that ride the gold's facets and beadwork, deep warm shadows (chiaroscuro) cut against maroon/leather grounds, shallow-to-medium depth of field, crisp macro detail on metalwork and stones, gallery/heirloom mood. On-model shots are soft-glam beauty crops (neck/decolletage, warm skin, muted earthy wardrobe). Subdued, refined, never flashy or cold-clinical.
capture_character.evidence: Consistent warm chiaroscuro and high gold-specular across DYTLFKEINgJ (single warm key, deep maroon falloff, leather-book staging) and DYcSAkSlFb8/DYepoLCFhWG. On-model soft-glam crops: DM-uXBlslqh (warm skin, terracotta top, neutral wall), DRSVRtDjCSA (golden silk slip, low warm light), DXSDa2ZDEAg/DXSFYIWDBHI (clean beauty crop, navy/black wardrobe for white-gold contrast). Heritage editorial mood in DVEvMAUjKQP (cinematic tungsten majlis).

products.name: خاتم ألماس على شكل سنبلة (white-gold leaf/wheat-spray diamond ring, 18K/750)

material_texture.value: Polished white gold (rhodium-bright silver-white, mirror specular on the band) set with channel/cluster baguette + round diamonds. The metal reads as a hard, cool, high-reflectance rigid substrate; the stones throw sharp pin-point fire and refractive sparkle, not soft glow. Surface is rigid and unbending, holds crisp edge highlights.
material_texture.evidence: DO8M6Z2jIZA: open-shank leaf-spray ring of clustered baguette+round diamonds on bright white-gold band, '750' (18K) hallmark visible on the shank; bright cool metal contrasts the maroon field.

dimensions.value: Adjustable open-shank ring, band ≈2mm; leaf cluster head ≈22–25mm tall. Scale anchor: a woman's ring finger (~16–17mm circumference) — the diamond spray rises about 1.5× the width of the finger it sits on.
dimensions.evidence: DO8M6Z2jIZA shows an open C-shank adjustable ring; proportions read against the implied finger; hallmark stamp scale confirms a standard ring band width.

companion_elements.value: World = the diamond/bridal-luxe world. One hero companion only: a single antique leather presentation book or maroon ring box on a maroon Sadu-bordered ground. Restrain to ONE — no scattered petals or multiple props.
companion_elements.evidence: Brand's own diamond cards stage on maroon + Sadu border (DO8M6Z2jIZA); leather-book staging is the brand's established prop world (DYcSAkSlFb8). Hashtags خاتم_الماس, ألماس, سولتير.

products.name: عقد لؤلؤ بدلاية ألماس (freshwater-pearl strand with white-gold/diamond pendant)

material_texture.value: Strand of natural/freshwater pearls — soft satin-iridescent nacre with gentle directional sheen and subtle surface tooth (not glassy, not matte), each pearl catching a soft broad highlight rather than a hard specular point. Pendant is bright white gold + pavé/baguette diamonds: hard, cool, sparkling — a deliberate texture contrast against the warm soft pearl.
material_texture.evidence: DXSDa2ZDEAg & DXSFYIWDBHI: graduated pearl strands (oval rice pearls and round pearls) with diamond-cluster drop pendants on white gold; pearl nacre sheen vs. diamond fire clearly distinct. Hashtags لؤلؤ_طبيعي, عقد_لؤلؤ, pearlnecklace.

dimensions.value: Princess-length strand ≈42–45cm; pearls ≈7–9mm each; pendant drop ≈35–40mm. Scale anchor: the human collarbone/decolletage — the strand sits at the base of the throat and the pendant falls roughly one hand-width below the hollow of the neck.
dimensions.evidence: DXSDa2ZDEAg & DXSFYIWDBHI both shown on-model; strand length sits at collarbone, pearls read ~one fingernail-width, pendant ~thumb-length against the sternum.

companion_elements.value: World = bridal/formal-evening world. One hero companion only: a dark wardrobe surface (navy or black silk neckline) that lets the pearls and white-gold read — OR a single folded ivory silk swatch. ONE only; the dark neckline IS the contrast companion.
companion_elements.evidence: DXSDa2ZDEAg (navy V-neck) and DXSFYIWDBHI (black slip) both use a single dark wardrobe plane as the contrasting ground; no extra props. Brand wordmark placed bottom-right.

products.name: سوار/غويشة وخاتم بالحبوب (21K beaded-edge bangle + matching ring set, wheat-engraved center)

material_texture.value: Solid 21K/22K warm yellow gold: a high-polish wheat/herringbone-engraved central band flanked by twin rows of fine gold granulation (beadwork). The beads read as hard, rounded, individually specular spheres; the engraved center catches a continuous warm highlight streak. Rigid, weighty, heirloom-solid — never thin or hollow-looking.
material_texture.evidence: DYTLFKEINgJ: hinged beaded-edge bangle with engraved wheat center + matching saddle ring, deep warm gold, each granule throwing its own highlight; staged on stacked leather books. Hashtags غوايش, سوار_ذهب, معاضد.

dimensions.value: Bangle inner diameter ≈60mm (standard wrist); band width ≈10–12mm. Matching ring band ≈9–10mm wide. Scale anchor: a woman's wrist (~55–60mm) — the bangle is a snug oval cuff with safety-chain clasp; the ring is a bold statement band ~2/3 the bangle's width.
dimensions.evidence: DYTLFKEINgJ shows a hinged cuff bangle with extension safety chain; band width reads against the ring beside it; sized to a typical adult female wrist.

companion_elements.value: World = heritage/heirloom legacy world ('Legacy of Gold · Since 1934'). One hero companion only: stacked antique leather-bound books (deep oxblood) as the staging plinth. Restrain to the books alone — no flowers, no extra metal.
companion_elements.evidence: DYTLFKEINgJ stages the set on two stacked dark-leather books; the brand's recurring leather-book/heritage prop world (also DYcSAkSlFb8, DYepoLCFhWG) carrying the 'Since 1934' signature.

products.name: عقد ذهب هندسي معلق (21K textured geometric square-motif statement necklace)

material_texture.value: Warm 21K yellow gold with a sand-cast / florentine textured surface on the square motifs (diffuse micro-sparkle, granular matte-bright) contrasted with smooth polished oval-link chain (bright continuous specular). The textured panels scatter light softly; the chain returns crisp highlights. Solid, supple chain that drapes; rigid geometric pendants.
material_texture.evidence: DOeSKrEjG1B: textured open-square pendant motifs with dangling chain tassels on a polished cable chain, displayed on a cream bust; texture vs. polish contrast clearly visible. Hashtags عقد_ذهب, النحت_الذهبي, تصميم_مجوهرات.

dimensions.value: Chain ≈45–50cm (matinee); central square pendant ≈28–32mm with a second drop + 3 short tassels below. Scale anchor: the neck/upper chest of a display bust — the pendant cluster spans roughly the width of two adult fingers and sits mid-sternum.
dimensions.evidence: DOeSKrEjG1B shown on a cream display bust; chain length and pendant span read directly against the bust's neck-to-chest proportion.

companion_elements.value: World = studio jewellery-presentation world. One hero companion only: the creamy ivory display bust/neck-form against the maroon ground. The bust IS the single companion — add nothing else.
companion_elements.evidence: DOeSKrEjG1B and DOeRr0jjKLc both present necklaces on a single ivory leatherette bust against a warm maroon backdrop, no additional props — the brand's clean studio presentation mode.

products.name: طقم فلاور فليجري (21K filigree flower-cluster set: pendant + ring + drop earrings, CZ-edged)

material_texture.value: Warm 21K yellow gold openwork filigree (fine twisted-wire lattice) forming flower clusters, rimmed with a single row of small CZ/diamond brilliants. The filigree reads as airy, intricate, light-catching golden mesh (highlights broken into many tiny points); the CZ rim adds a crisp sparkle outline. Delicate but rigid; the gold wires hold their woven shape.
material_texture.evidence: DYEnXyZlGjO: matching ring, flower-cluster pendant, and drop earrings in woven gold filigree edged with pavé stones, laid on burgundy silk. Hashtags تصنيع_مجوهرات, طقم_ذهب, صياغة_يدوية, حرفية_عالية.

dimensions.value: Pendant flower ≈30mm across; earring drops ≈25mm; ring face ≈22mm. Scale anchor: laid as a flat-lay, the pendant cluster is roughly the size of a large coin / two-finger width; the chain is ≈45cm.
dimensions.evidence: DYEnXyZlGjO flat-lay on silk; the three pieces read at consistent relative scale — pendant largest, earrings ~80% of it, ring face matching the pendant flower head.

companion_elements.value: World = soft luxe / gifting world. One hero companion only: a single sweep of burgundy/oxblood silk satin as the drape ground (the brand's owned maroon). Restrain to the silk drape — no flowers, no box, no second fabric.
companion_elements.evidence: DYEnXyZlGjO stages the full set on one burgundy silk drape (with a thin Sadu-bordered cream edge); single-fabric ground is the brand's flat-lay convention. Maroon is brand-owned (see palette).

products.name: سبيكة ذهب 999.9 (investment gold bar / bullion, 10 tolas fine gold)

material_texture.value: Solid minted fine-gold bar (999.9) — smooth, dense, mirror-bright cast face with crisp stamped relief lettering and a beveled edge. Reads as heavy, flawless, hard metal with a single broad mirror-specular sweep across the face; corners catch hard highlights. No texture but the stamped relief — pure reflective bullion.
material_texture.evidence: DPZazMpDAYL: a 'SUISSE 10 TOLAS FINE GOLD 999.9' minted bar with embossed lettering, photographed on the maroon Sadu ground; mirror reflection of warm light across the face. Hashtags سبائك_ذهب, سبيكة_ذهب, استثمار_الذهب, ذهب_للادخار.

dimensions.value: 10-tola bar ≈ 116.6g, roughly 50mm × 28mm × 4mm. Scale anchor: a credit card (≈86×54mm) — the bar is a bit over half a card's length and about half its width; pocketable, palm-sized.
dimensions.evidence: DPZazMpDAYL bar is stamped '10 TOLAS' (a standard Gulf bullion unit ≈116.6g); proportions read as a flat rectangular ingot against the framed maroon background.

companion_elements.value: World = investment / wealth-store world. One hero companion only: the brand's owned maroon Sadu-patterned drape or ground beneath the bar (the maroon silk in DPZazMpDAYL). Restrain to the single maroon textile ground — no coins, no extra bars, no scattered props.
companion_elements.evidence: DPZazMpDAYL stages the lone bar on a single maroon silk/Sadu ground with the alnasser '1934' wordmark and alnj.net; brand's investment-card convention is one bar on the owned maroon field, nothing else.

confidence: experimental — All values are GROUNDED in the brand's own media corpus (148 IG images sampled across studio, on-model, flat-lay, graphic-card, and editorial modes) plus truth_pack recurring terms and hashtags; nothing borrowed or generic-sector. However: (1) fingerprint.json l3_visual is empty and l1/l2 are RED/newborn, so no client-confirmed palette hex or voice exists yet — the maroon/cream/gold reading is inferred from consistent visual recurrence, not a client-supplied brand book. (2) prices=[] and no product is confirmed (all product_candidates are confidence:candidate), so dimensions are realistic-standard estimates with named scale anchors, NOT measured specs. (3) Exact hex values are eyeballed from JPEGs, not sampled with a color picker. All four brand fields and six product profiles should be confirmed with the client (or a color-picker pass on the source files) before locking into the schema.
